powpow/fswatch

  • Index
Search:
Group by:
  • Imports
  • Types
    • FileSystemEvent
    • FileWatcher
    • FileWatcherCb
  • Procs
        close
      • close(w: FileWatcher)
        newFileWatcher
      • newFileWatcher(loop: Loop; path: string; callback: FileWatcherCb): FileWatcher

Monitors file/directory changes using kqueue (macOS/BSD) or inotify (Linux). Integrates with the powpow event loop — no polling thread required.

Imports

loop, types

Types

FileSystemEvent = enum
  fseModified, fseCreated, fseDeleted, fseRenamed, fseAttrib, fseLinkCount,
  fseRevoke
FileWatcher = ref object
  loop*: Loop
  path*: string
  callback*: FileWatcherCb
  when defined(macosx) or defined(bsd):
  elif defined(linux):
FileWatcherCb = proc (w: FileWatcher; events: set[FileSystemEvent]) {.closure.}

Procs

proc close(w: FileWatcher) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newFileWatcher(loop: Loop; path: string; callback: FileWatcherCb): FileWatcher {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, OSError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
